name: archscope-desktop
description: ArchScope Electron desktop shell — wraps the shared React frontend with a bundled Python engine.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,el "npm --prefix ../frontend run dev" "npm run electron:dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix ../frontend run build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder
scripts.build:dir: npm --prefix ../frontend run build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:win: npm --prefix ../frontend run build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:mac: npm --prefix ../frontend run build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm --prefix ../frontend run build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --linux
